conditions.description: نسبة البناء في الدور الأرضي لا تزيد عن نسبة (param1 %) من مساحة الأرض
conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>

  <Rules>
    <Rule id="Condition1_R1" desc="Rule for Condition1" chainable="true" priority="901">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ (((GroundFloorArea + AnnexuresAreasSum - GroundShaftsAreasSum) / LandArea) * 100) > (param1 + param2) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status" >
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "نسبة البناء في الدور الأرضي أكبر من نسبة param1% من مساحة الأرض" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Result">
          <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>
    <Rule id="Condition1_R2" desc="Rule for Condition1" chainable="true" priority="902">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ (((GroundFloorArea + AnnexuresAreasSum - GroundShaftsAreasSum) / LandArea) * 100) <= (param1 + param2) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ true ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>
  </Rules>

  <Facts>
    <Fact id="LandArea" desc="Land Area" type="double" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ //Land/Area/area/@value ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="GroundFloorArea" desc="Ground Floor Area" type="double" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ //GroundFloor/Area/area/@value ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="AnnexuresAreasSum" desc="Ground Floor Annexures Areas Sum" type="double" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ sum(//AnnexuresAreas/annex/@area) ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="GroundShaftsAreasSum" desc="Ground Floor Shafts Areas Sum" type="double" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ sum(//shaft/@id[not(. = preceding::shaft/@id)]/../../shaft[@type='SkyLight']/@area) ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="ErrorElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ //boundaryElements/element/@id | //AnnexuresAreas/annex/Element/@id | //shaft[@type!='SkyLight']/@id ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="Status" desc="Condition Status" type="boolean" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ Root/Status ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="Message" desc="Condition Message" type="string" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ Root/Message ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="Result" desc="Condition Result" type="string" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ Root/Result ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
  </Facts>

</RuleEngine>

conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>

  <Rules>

conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>

  <Rules>
    <Rule id="Condition301_V1" desc="Validation for Condition301" chainable="true" priority="1">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ BuildingIsValidSittingRoom == (0-1) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "خاصية الاستخدام غير معرفة لإحدى الغرف" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>
    <Rule id="Condition301_V4" desc="Validation for Condition301" chainable="true" priority="4">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ BuildingIsValidDinningRoom == (0-1) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">

    <Rule id="Condition301_V5" desc="Validation for Condition301" chainable="true" priority="5">

        <![CDATA[ BuildingIsValidDinningRoom == (0-2) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "مستوى الدور الارضي غير موجود بالرسم" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>
    <Rule id="Condition301_V6" desc="Validation for Condition301" chainable="true" priority="6">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ BuildingIsValidDinningRoom == (0-3) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "مستوى الدور الاول غير موجود بالرسم" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>

    <Rule id="Condition301_R1" desc="Rule for Condition301" chainable="true" priority="7">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ BuildingIsValidSittingRoom == 0 OR BuildingIsValidDinningRoom == 0 ]]>

          <![CDATA[ false ]]>

conditions.description: في حال فصل الأدوار الى وحدات سكنية مستقله يجب توفير موقف لكل وحدة سكينة
conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>
    <Rules>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R0" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="900">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount == 0 ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "يجب تأمين موقف سيارة داخل حدود الملكية لكل وحدة سكنية" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R1" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="901">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (LandArea > param1) AND (BuildingFloorsCount < 2) AND (ParkingCount < 2) ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "في حالة الأراضي ذات المساحة الأكبر من param1 متر يلزم التاكد من وجود موقفين سيارة على الأقل" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R2" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="902">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ IsValidExitDoor == 1 ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "يجب تأمين باب دخول أو خروج واحد على الأقل لكل وحدة سكنية مستقلة في الدور الواحد" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ FloorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R3" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="903">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount < BuildingFloorsCount ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "عدد مواقف السيارات أقل من عدد الوحدات السكنية في المبنى" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ StoryElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R4" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="904">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount > BuildingFloorsCount ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R5" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="905">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (ParkingCount > 0) AND (ParkingCount == BuildingFloorsCount) ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
    </Rules>
    <Facts>
        <Fact id="LandArea" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //area/@value ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="IsValidExitDoor" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //BuildingFloorUnits/@isValidExitDoor ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="BuildingFloorsCount" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //BuildingFloorUnits/@totalFloorUnit ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="ParkingCount" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ count(//parking) ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="StoryElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //Story/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="FloorElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //floor/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="ErrorElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //area/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Status" desc="Condition Status" type="boolean" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Status ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Message" desc="Condition Message" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Message ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Result" desc="Condition Result" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Result ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
    </Facts>
</RuleEngine>

condition.description: في حال فصل الأدوار الى وحدات سكنية مستقله يجب توفير موقف لكل وحدة سكينة
condition.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>
    <Rules>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R0" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="900">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount == 0 ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "يجب تأمين موقف سيارة داخل حدود الملكية لكل وحدة سكنية" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R1" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="901">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (LandArea > param1) AND (BuildingFloorsCount < 2) AND (ParkingCount < 2) ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "في حالة الأراضي ذات المساحة الأكبر من param1 متر يلزم التاكد من وجود موقفين سيارة على الأقل" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R2" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="902">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ IsValidExitDoor == 1 ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "يجب تأمين باب دخول أو خروج واحد على الأقل لكل وحدة سكنية مستقلة في الدور الواحد" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ FloorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R3" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="903">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount < BuildingFloorsCount ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "عدد مواقف السيارات أقل من عدد الوحدات السكنية في المبنى" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ StoryElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R4" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="904">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ ParkingCount > BuildingFloorsCount ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition10001_R5" desc="Rule for Condition10001" chainable="true" priority="905">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (ParkingCount > 0) AND (ParkingCount == BuildingFloorsCount) ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
    </Rules>
    <Facts>
        <Fact id="LandArea" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //area/@value ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="IsValidExitDoor" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //BuildingFloorUnits/@isValidExitDoor ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="BuildingFloorsCount" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //BuildingFloorUnits/@totalFloorUnit ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="ParkingCount" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ count(//parking) ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="StoryElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //Story/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="FloorElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //floor/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="ErrorElementsIds" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ //area/@id ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Status" desc="Condition Status" type="boolean" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Status ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Message" desc="Condition Message" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Message ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
        <Fact id="Result" desc="Condition Result" type="string" modelId="Data">
            <xpath><![CDATA[ Root/Result ]]></xpath>
        </Fact>
    </Facts>
</RuleEngine>

condition.description: الارتداد الجانبي والخلفي سواء كان المجاور جار أو ممر مشاه يكون param4 م كحد أدنى وفي حال كان المجاور شارع يكون param1 عرض الشارع بحد أدنى param2 م ولا يقل عن param5 في حالة المجاور ساحة أو ميدان

conditions.description: في حالة استخدام القبو كمواقف للسيارات يلزم توفير مدخل ومخرج
conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>
    <Rules>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R0" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="900">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ BasementsCount == 0 ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم نجاح الشرط لعدم وجود قبو بالمبني" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R1" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="901">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount == 0) ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم نجاح الشرط لعدم وجود جراج بقبو بالمبني" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R2" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="902">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount != 0) AND (RampCount == 0)  ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "في حالة استخدام القبو في مواقف السيارت يلزم توفير منحدر للدخول والخروج" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R3" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="903">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount != 0) AND (RampCount != 0) AND (RampDoorCount == 0)  ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "يجب أن يكون هناك باب واحد على الأقل للقبو لدخول وخروج السيارات" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R4" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="904">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount != 0) AND (RampCount != 0) AND (RampDoorCount == 1) AND (ErrorElementsIds != "") ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ " يجب ألا يقل عرض باب الدخول والخروج للسيارت في القبو عن param1 م" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R5" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="905">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount != 0) AND (RampCount != 0) AND (RampDoorCount > 1) AND (ErrorElementsIds != "") ]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ false ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ " يجب ألا يقل عرض أبواب الدخول والخروج للسيارت في القبو عن param2 م" ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Result"><![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIds ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
        <Rule id="Condition25_R6" desc="Rule for Condition25" chainable="true" priority="906">
            <Condition><![CDATA[ (BasementsCount != 0) AND (ParkingCount != 0) AND (RampCount != 0) AND (RampDoorCount != 0) AND (ErrorElementsIds == "")]]></Condition>
            <Actions result="true">
                <Evaluate factId="Status"><![CDATA[ true ]]></Evaluate>
                <Evaluate factId="Message"><![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]></Evaluate>
            </Actions>
        </Rule>
    </Rules>

        </Fact>

conditions.description: البروز على الارتداد جهة الشوارع بعرض أكبر من أو تساوي param7 م كحد أقصى param1 م ضمن حدود الارتداد الأدنى وغير مسموح بالبروز على الارتداد للشوارع أقل من param7 م
conditions.rules:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<RuleEngine>

  <Rules>
    <Rule id="Condition10017_R0" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="900">
        <Condition>
          <![CDATA[ StreetCountMainElevation == 0 ]]>
        </Condition>
        <Actions result="true">
          <Evaluate factId="Status" >
            <![CDATA[ false ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Message">
            <![CDATA[ "لم يتم التعرف على الواجهة الرئيسية برجاء مراجعه دليل المستخدم" ]]>
          </Evaluate>
        </Actions>
      </Rule>    
    <Rule id="Condition10017_R1" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="901">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[(StreetCount == 0) ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "يجب توافر شارع مجاور لقطعة الارض" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>

    <Rule id="Condition10017_R2" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="902">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsMainStreetLessThan10M != "" ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status" >
          <![CDATA[ false ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "لا يسمح بالبروز عن الإرتداد في الشوارع الرئيسية الأقل من param7 م" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Result">
          <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsMainStreetLessThan10M ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>

    <Rule id="Condition10017_R3" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="903">
        <Condition>
          <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsBackAndSideLessThan10M != "" ]]>
        </Condition>
        <Actions result="true">
          <Evaluate factId="Status" >
            <![CDATA[ false ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Message">
            <![CDATA[ "لا يسمح بالبروز عن الإرتداد في الشوارع الجانبيه أو الخلفيه الأقل من param7 م" ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Result">
            <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsBackAndSideLessThan10M ]]>
          </Evaluate>
        </Actions>
      </Rule>

    <Rule id="Condition10017_R4" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="904">
        <Condition>
          <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsMainElevation != "" ]]>
        </Condition>
        <Actions result="true">
          <Evaluate factId="Status" >
            <![CDATA[ false ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Message">
            <![CDATA[ "البروز على الارتداد الأمامي للشوارع الرئيسيه يزيد عن param1 م" ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Result">
            <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsMainElevation ]]>
          </Evaluate>
        </Actions>
      </Rule>

      <Rule id="Condition10017_R5" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="905">
        <Condition>
          <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsBackAndSide != "" ]]>
        </Condition>
        <Actions result="true">
          <Evaluate factId="Status" >
            <![CDATA[ false ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Message">
            <![CDATA[ "البروز على الارتداد الأمامي للشوارع الجانبيه والخلفيه يجب ألا يزيد عن param1 م" ]]>
          </Evaluate>
          <Evaluate factId="Result">
            <![CDATA[ ErrorElementsIdsBackAndSide ]]>
          </Evaluate>
        </Actions>
      </Rule>

    <Rule id="Condition10017_R6" desc="Rule for Condition10017" chainable="true" priority="906">
      <Condition>
        <![CDATA[ StreetCount !=0 ]]>
      </Condition>
      <Actions result="true">
        <Evaluate factId="Status">
          <![CDATA[ true ]]>
        </Evaluate>
        <Evaluate factId="Message">
          <![CDATA[ "تم اختبار الشرط بنجاح" ]]>
        </Evaluate>
      </Actions>
    </Rule>
  </Rules>

  <Facts>
    
    <Fact id="StreetCount" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[ count(//neighbor[@type='Street']) ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="StreetCountMainElevation" desc="" type="double" modelId="Data">
        <xpath>
          <![CDATA[ count(//neighbor[@type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='true']) ]]>
        </xpath>
      </Fact>
    <Fact id="ErrorElementsIdsMainElevation" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
      <xpath>
        <![CDATA[
         //storey[@name!='ground floor'and rebounds/rebound[../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor[@type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='true' and @streetWidth >= ((1 div param3) * param4)]and @value < ( (../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor/@streetWidth * param3) - param1 - param2)]]/../..//*[(name()='rebound' and ../ancestor::storey[@name!='ground floor'] and @value < ( (../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor/@streetWidth * param3) - param1 - param2)) or (name()='neighbor' and @type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='true' and @streetWidth>= (((1 div param3) * param4)))] /@*[name()='elementId' or name()='id'] | //storey[@name!='ground floor' and  rebounds/rebound[../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor[@type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='true' and @streetWidth < ((1 div param3) * param4)] and @value < (param4 - param1 - param2)]]/../..//*[(name()='rebound' and ../ancestor::storey[@name!='ground floor'] and @value < (param4 - param1 - param2)) or(name()='neighbor' and @type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='true' and @streetWidth < ((1 div param3) * param4))]/@*[name()='elementId' or name()='id']  
         ]]>
      </xpath>
    </Fact>
    <Fact id="ErrorElementsIdsBackAndSide" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
        <xpath>
          <![CDATA[
           //storey[@name!='ground floor'and rebounds/rebound[../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor[@type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='false' and @streetWidth >= ((1 div param3) * param5)]and @value < ( (../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor/@streetWidth * param3) - param1 - param2)]]/../..//*[(name()='rebound' and ../ancestor::storey[@name!='ground floor'] and @value < ( (../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor/@streetWidth * param3) - param1 - param2)) or (name()='neighbor' and @type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='false' and @streetWidth>= (((1 div param3) * param5)))] /@*[name()='elementId' or name()='id'] | //storey[@name!='ground floor' and  rebounds/rebound[../../../../neighborsInfo/neighbor[@type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='false' and @streetWidth < ((1 div param3) * param5)] and @value < (param5 - param1 - param2)]]/../..//*[(name()='rebound' and ../ancestor::storey[@name!='ground floor'] and @value < (param5 - param1 - param2)) or(name()='neighbor' and @type='Street' and @IsMainElevation='false' and @streetWidth < ((1 div param3) * param5))]/@*[name()='elementId' or name()='id']  
           ]]>
        </xpath>
      </Fact>
    <Fact id="ErrorElementsIdsMainStreetLessThan10M" desc="" type="string" modelId="Data">
